授業方法: Seminar. Based on weekly readings and class discussions, students will gain a broad understanding of contemporary Japan. At the beginning of each class the instructor will introduce the class topic followed by class discussions which will be supplemented by diverse materials, such as recent statistics, newspaper articles and movie clips.

第2回:
【Core Week 1】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Cuisine and Identity in Contemporary Japan
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第3回: Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: The House and Family System
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第5回: Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第6回:
【Core Week 5】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Field Trip to Japanese Elementary School
Preparation for Field Trip. Duration about 4 hours.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese Students.
第8回:
【Core Week 7】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese Students.
第9回:
【Core Week 8】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese Students.
第10回:
【Core Week 9】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Interactive Class with Japanese Students
Preparation for class with Japanese Students.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Gender Roles in Japanese Society
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第12回:
【Core Week 11】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: The Legal System and Crime in Japan
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第13回:
【Core Week 12】
Face-to-face class／《90minutes》
Theme: Race, Ethnicity and Minorities
Reading of assigned reading and preparation for class discussion.
第14回:
【Flex Hours】
Online class (task-based)／《180minutes》
Theme: Feedback on Interactive Class with Japanese Students
トピック.授業外学習2: Beside the study required outside class specified above students will also have to write a text summary, complete the assigned homework, and present a small research project on Japan.

教科書/Required texts0: A reading list of relevant articles will be provided in the first class
学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1
※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）

成績評価Grading2: 備考　Note Class Participation (20%): Active participation in class discussions and completing the assigned homework for this class.Project Presentation (40%): Group presentation of a small research project on Japan. Text Summary (40%): Summary of one of the assigned class readings.
備考Note0: For questions you can contact the instructor by email: matthias.hennings@kwansei.ac.jp

name: 【300】総合日本学習科目（現代日本演習Ｂ）　２／JSC Modern Japan Seminar B
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
Class Participation (20%): Active participation in class discussions and completing the assigned homework for this class.
Project Presentation (40%): Group presentation of a small research project on Japan.
Text Summary (40%): Summary of one of the assigned class readings.
